Go High Level (GHL)Not Connected

Connect your GHL account to enable AI-powered workflow automation, lead management, and pipeline optimization.

📧
Google WorkspaceNot Connected

Connect Gmail, Google Calendar, Drive, and Docs for AI agents to read emails, schedule events, and manage documents.

⚡
n8n Workflow Automation Connected

Connect n8n to trigger workflows, execute nodes, and coordinate complex automation pipelines with your AI agents.

🔌
ComposioNot Connected

Composio enables 250+ tool integrations for AI agents. Connect your Composio API key to unlock social, CRM, and productivity tools.

🗄️
Supabase Connected

Connect your Supabase project for database operations, authentication, and real-time subscriptions.

🤖
OpenAI Connected

Configure your OpenAI API key for GPT-4, Whisper, TTS, and image generation capabilities.

Need a different integration? Connect tools via MCP servers on the Tools page, or use n8n to bridge any API. Contact us to request a native integration.
